_comment: Worked example of the 'ordinal / time-gated follow-up sequence' shape: the rate depends on WHICH follow-up it is and a minimum gap between visits — not a flat per-visit rate.

additional_information.note: Follow-ups are an ordered sequence after the primary cardiac procedure. The 3rd follow-up is Rs.0, the 4th Rs.5000, the 5th Rs.2500, each at least ~3 months apart. Ordinals 1-2 are assumed bundled into the primary package.
additional_information.gap_caveat: min_gap_days=90 derived from the 'After 3 months' wording; confirm exact window against the clean HBP 2022 master Excel.

source_refs.pricing.sequence.ordinal_rates_inr: HBP-2022.pdf master rows MC022 follow-up: 'Third Follow-up - After 3 months' = 0, 'fourth Follow-up - After 3 months' = 5000, 'Fifth Follow-up - After 3 months' = 2500
